meta.notes:
GitHub webhook → n8n → ccmux serve /webhook/github → ccmux auto session

Setup:
1. In GitHub repo: Settings → Webhooks → Add webhook
   Payload URL: https://<your-n8n>/webhook/github-issues
   Content type: application/json
   Events: Issues only
2. In n8n: Import this workflow, set active=true.
3. In n8n Settings → Environment, add CCMUX_WEBHOOK_SECRET=<shared secret>.
4. In ~/.ccmux/config.json, set the same value as n8n.webhookSecret.
5. Run: ccmux serve  (listens on :9090).

BL-1 (security): The Build Payload + HMAC node signs the outbound body with
CCMUX_WEBHOOK_SECRET and sends the digest as X-Hub-Signature-256. ccmux
rejects requests with a missing or non-matching signature when its
n8n.webhookSecret is set. Body must be sent verbatim — switching the HTTP
Request node to JSON-body mode would re-serialize and break the signature.
